tEn: Aria: An Open Multimodal Native Mixture-of-Experts Model
tZh: Aria：一个开放的多模态原生混合专家模型
sEn: Aria is an open multimodal native Mixture-of-Experts model that outperforms many existing models across multimodal, language, and coding tasks.
sZh: Aria是一个开放的多模态原生混合专家模型，在多模态、语言和编码任务上优于许多现有模型。
absEn: Information comes in diverse modalities. Multimodal native AI models are essential to integrate real-world information and deliver comprehensive understanding. While proprietary multimodal native models exist, their lack of openness imposes obstacles for adoptions, let alone adaptations. To fill this gap, we introduce Aria, an open multimodal native model with best-in-class performance across a wide range of multimodal, language, and coding tasks. Aria is a mixture-of-expert model with 3.9B and 3.5B activated parameters per visual token and text token, respectively. It outperforms Pixtral-12B and Llama3.2-11B, and is competitive against the best proprietary models on various multimodal tasks. We pre-train Aria from scratch following a 4-stage pipeline, which progressively equips the model with strong capabilities in language understanding, multimodal understanding, long context window, and instruction following. We open-source the model weights along with a codebase that facilitates easy adoptions and adaptations of Aria in real-world applications.
absZh: 信息以多种模态呈现。多模态原生AI模型对于整合现实世界信息并提供全面理解至关重要。尽管存在专有的多模态原生模型，但它们缺乏开放性，这给采用带来了障碍，更不用说适应了。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了Aria，一个开放的多模态原生模型，在广泛的多模态、语言和编码任务中具有最佳性能。Aria是一个混合专家模型，每个视觉令牌和文本令牌分别有3.9B和3.5B激活参数。它在各种多模态任务上优于Pixtral-12B和Llama3.2-11B，并与最佳专有模型竞争。我们按照4阶段流程从头开始预训练Aria，逐步使模型具备语言理解、多模态理解、长上下文窗口和指令遵循的强大能力。我们开源了模型权重以及一个代码库，以促进Aria在实际应用中的轻松采用和适应。

contrib.en: Introduces Aria, the first open multimodal native MoE model with best-in-class performance.
contrib.zh: 提出Aria，首个开源多模态原生MoE模型，性能领先同类。

contrib.en: Proposes a 4-stage training pipeline for developing multimodal native models from scratch.
contrib.zh: 提出四阶段训练流程，从头开发多模态原生模型。

contrib.en: Achieves superior performance over Pixtral-12B and Llama3.2-11B on multimodal, language, and coding tasks.
contrib.zh: 在多模态、语言和编码任务上优于Pixtral-12B和Llama3.2-11B。

contrib.en: Competes with proprietary models like GPT-4o and Gemini-1.5 on various multimodal benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 在多项多模态基准上与GPT-4o和Gemini-1.5等专有模型竞争。

contrib.en: Open-sources model weights and a training framework for easy adoption and fine-tuning.
contrib.zh: 开源模型权重和训练框架，便于采用和微调。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong long-context multimodal understanding and instruction following.
contrib.zh: 展示出强大的长上下文多模态理解和指令遵循能力。

limits.en: Model performance is evaluated on specific benchmarks; real-world generalization may vary.
limits.zh: 模型性能在特定基准上评估，实际泛化能力可能不同。

limits.en: The 64K context window may not suffice for extremely long multimodal sequences.
limits.zh: 64K上下文窗口可能不足以处理极长的多模态序列。

limits.en: Training data is limited to knowledge until May 2024; newer information is not covered.
limits.zh: 训练数据截至2024年5月，未涵盖更新信息。

limits.en: The model's visual encoder is pretrained on SigLIP-SO400M; other visual domains may be less effective.
limits.zh: 视觉编码器基于SigLIP-SO400M预训练，其他视觉领域效果可能较差。

limits.en: Expert specialization analysis is limited to three domains; broader generalization not confirmed.
limits.zh: 专家专业化分析限于三个领域，更广泛的泛化未确认。

items.en: Information comes in diverse modalities. Multimodal native AI models are essential to integrate real-world information and deliver comprehensive understanding. While proprietary multimodal native models exist, their lack of openness imposes obstacles for adoptions, let alone adaptations. To fill this gap, we introduce Aria, an open multimodal native model with best-in-class performance across a wide range of multimodal, language, and coding tasks. Aria is a mixture-of-expert model with 3.9B and 3.5B activated parameters per visual token and text token, respectively. It outperforms Pixtral-12B and Llama3.2-11B, and is competitive against the best proprietary models on various multimodal tasks. We pre-train Aria from scratch following a 4-stage pipeline, which progressively equips the model with strong capabilities in language understanding, multimodal understanding, long context window, and instruction following. We open-source the model weights along with a codebase that facilitates easy adoptions and adaptations of Aria in real-world applications.
items.zh: 信息以多种模态呈现。多模态原生AI模型对于整合现实世界信息并提供全面理解至关重要。尽管存在专有的多模态原生模型，但其缺乏开放性给采用带来了障碍，更不用说适配了。为填补这一空白，我们推出了Aria，一个开放的多模态原生模型，在广泛的多模态、语言和编码任务中具有一流性能。Aria是一个混合专家模型，每个视觉令牌和文本令牌分别激活3.9B和3.5B参数。它在各种多模态任务上优于Pixtral-12B和Llama3.2-11B，并与最佳专有模型竞争。我们按照4阶段流程从头开始预训练Aria，逐步赋予模型强大的语言理解、多模态理解、长上下文窗口和指令遵循能力。我们开源了模型权重以及一个代码库，便于在现实应用中轻松采用和适配Aria。

items.en: In this report, we present Aria, the first open mixture-of-experts (MoE) model that is multimodal native. The term multimodal native has been used in prior literature to refer to different model capabilities, without a clear consensus. Here, we provide a quantifiable definition: A multimodal native model refers to a single model with strong understanding capabilities across multiple input modalities (e.g. text, code, image, video), that matches or exceeds the modality-specialized models of similar capacities. Our definition aligns with the user experience of proprietary multimodal models such as GPT-4o or Gemini-1.5, where a user does not need to differentiate inputs from different modalities. Instead, the model is expected to seamlessly handle and integrate multiple modalities’ input with a single model.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了Aria，这是第一个开放的多模态原生混合专家（MoE）模型。术语“多模态原生”在先前的文献中已被用于指代不同的模型能力，但没有明确的共识。在此，我们提供一个可量化的定义：多模态原生模型是指一个单一模型，在多种输入模态（如文本、代码、图像、视频）上具有强大的理解能力，达到或超过类似容量的模态专用模型。我们的定义与专有多模态模型（如GPT-4o或Gemini-1.5）的用户体验一致，用户无需区分不同模态的输入。相反，模型应能无缝处理和整合多种模态的输入。

items.en: While proprietary multimodal native models are not uncommon, their training recipes remain largely undisclosed. As a result, most open-source models are modal-specialized or show subpar performance across modalities. In this research, we fill the gap and introduce training recipes for developing multimodal native models from scratch, which includes key aspects below:
items.zh: 虽然专有的多模态原生模型并不罕见，但其训练方法大多未公开。因此，大多数开源模型要么是模态专用的，要么在跨模态上表现不佳。在本研究中，我们填补了这一空白，并介绍了从头开发多模态原生模型的训练方法，包括以下关键方面：

items.en: Model Architecture. The core of our model is a fine-grained mixture-of-experts decoder, which enables faster training and inference speed over dense decoders, due to more efficient parameter utilization through expert specialization. Aria MoE activates 3.5B parameters per text token and has a total of 24.9B parameters. Visual input of variable length, size, and aspect is encoded as visual tokens using a lightweight visual encoder of 438M parameters. Aria has a long multimodal context window of 64k tokens.
items.zh: 模型架构。我们模型的核心是一个细粒度的混合专家解码器，由于通过专家专业化实现了更高效的参数利用，因此比密集解码器具有更快的训练和推理速度。Aria MoE每个文本令牌激活3.5B参数，总参数为24.9B。可变长度、大小和宽高比的视觉输入使用一个轻量级视觉编码器（438M参数）编码为视觉令牌。Aria具有64k令牌的长多模态上下文窗口。

items.en: Data. Aria is pre-trained on 6.4T language tokens and 400B multimodal tokens. We develop a rigorous procedure to curate high-quality data from a diverse set of sources. The multimodal pre-train data includes four major categories: interleaved image-text sequence from common crawl, synthetic image captions, documents transcriptions and question-answering pairs, synthetic video captions and question-answering pairs.
items.zh: 数据。Aria在6.4T语言令牌和400B多模态令牌上进行了预训练。我们开发了一套严格的流程，从多样化的来源中策划高质量数据。多模态预训练数据包括四大类：来自通用爬虫的交错图像-文本序列、合成图像标题、文档转录和问答对、合成视频标题和问答对。

items.en: Training Pipeline. We design a 4-stage training pipeline, including language pre-training, multimodal pre-training, multimodal long-context pre-training, and multimodal post-training. Each stage is designed to progressively enhance certain model capabilities while maintaining those acquired in early stages. Our pipeline efficiently and effectively exploits the data and compute resources to maximize model performance.
items.zh: 训练流程。我们设计了一个4阶段训练流程，包括语言预训练、多模态预训练、多模态长上下文预训练和多模态后训练。每个阶段旨在逐步增强某些模型能力，同时保持早期阶段获得的能力。我们的流程高效且有效地利用数据和算力资源，以最大化模型性能。

items.en: Following this recipe, Aria demonstrates state-of-the-art performance as an open multimodal native model. Compared to Pixtral-12B (Mixtral, 2024) and Llama3.2-11B (Dubey et al., 2024), Aria demonstrates superior performance across a wide range of multimodal, language, and coding tasks, while enjoying lower inference cost due to the fewer number of activated parameters. In addition, Aria also performs on par with proprietary models such as GPT-4o and Gemini-1.5 on various multimodal tasks. The detailed benchmark results are present in Table 1.
items.zh: 遵循这一方法，Aria作为开放的多模态原生模型展示了最先进的性能。与Pixtral-12B和Llama3.2-11B相比，Aria在广泛的多模态、语言和编码任务上表现出优越性能，同时由于激活参数更少，推理成本更低。此外，Aria在各种多模态任务上的表现也与GPT-4o和Gemini-1.5等专有模型相当。详细的基准测试结果见表1。

items.en: We release Aria under the Apache 2.0 license, free for both academic and commercial use. To facilitate easier adoption, we open-source a training framework that enables finetuning Aria on a wide variety of data sources and formats, using as few as one GPU.
items.zh: 我们在Apache 2.0许可下发布Aria，免费用于学术和商业用途。为便于采用，我们开源了一个训练框架，支持在多种数据源和格式上微调Aria，仅需一个GPU。

items.en: MoE has emerged as a preferred architecture over dense models for building compute-efficient large language models (Fedus et al., 2022; Jiang et al., 2024; Dai et al., 2024; Ludziejewski et al., 2024). The core idea of MoE is to replace each feed-forward layer (FFN) in a Transformer with a set of experts, where each expert is structurally identical to an FFN. Each input token is routed to only a subset of experts in each layer. The sparsity of expert activation ensures computational efficiency of an MoE layer.
items.zh: MoE已成为构建计算高效大型语言模型的首选架构，优于密集模型。MoE的核心思想是将Transformer中的每个前馈层（FFN）替换为一组专家，其中每个专家在结构上与FFN相同。每个输入令牌在每个层中仅路由到专家子集。专家激活的稀疏性确保了MoE层的计算效率。

items.en: Due to the vast diversity of multimodal data, we hypothesize that expert specialization is important for an multimodal MoE to understand input from different data distributions. To this end, we use a large number of fine-grained experts with smaller FFN hidden dimension than standard FFNs, similar to (Dai et al., 2024). In particular, Aria has 66 experts in each MoE layer, 2 of the 66 experts are shared among all inputs to capture common knowledge, whereas 6 more experts are activated for each token by a router module. Table 2 shows the detailed architectural configuration.
items.zh: 由于多模态数据的巨大多样性，我们假设专家专业化对于多模态MoE理解来自不同数据分布的输入至关重要。为此，我们使用了大量细粒度专家，其FFN隐藏维度小于标准FFN，类似于Dai等人（2024）的方法。具体来说，Aria在每个MoE层中有66个专家，其中2个专家在所有输入之间共享以捕获通用知识，而每个令牌由路由器模块额外激活6个专家。表2显示了详细的架构配置。

items.en: Aria is significantly different from previous multimodal MoEs which either design modality-specific expert architectures or rely on upcycling from dense models (Lin et al., 2024b; Shen et al., 2023; Lin et al., 2024a). Our multimodal native MoE is pre-trained from scratch with modality-generic experts. In Section 4.2, we show that multimodal expert specialization naturally arises after pre-training.
items.zh: Aria与之前的多模态MoE有显著不同，后者要么设计模态特定的专家架构，要么依赖于从密集模型升级。我们的多模态原生MoE从头开始预训练，使用模态通用的专家。在第4.2节中，我们展示了预训练后多模态专家专业化自然出现。

items.en: We design a lightweight visual encoder to convert visual inputs (i.e. images or video frames) into continuous visual tokens with the same feature dimension as word embeddings, which enables the MoE to seamlessly integrate visual and language inputs.
items.zh: 我们设计了一个轻量级视觉编码器，将视觉输入（即图像或视频帧）转换为连续的视觉令牌，其特征维度与词嵌入相同，这使得MoE能够无缝集成视觉和语言输入。

items.en: Drawing inspiration from previous work (Li et al., 2023; Bai et al., 2023; Laurençon et al., 2024), our visual encoder consists of a Vision Transformer (ViT) and a projection module. The ViT accepts images in their native aspect ratio as variable-length sequences of patches (Lee et al., 2023; Dehghani et al., 2023), which preserves the inherent information structure in images. We categorize image size into three ranges: (1) medium-resolution images, where the longer edge is resized to 490 pixels; (2) high-resolution images, where the longer edge is resized to 980 pixels; (3) ultra-high-resolution images, where an image is dynamically decomposed into multiple high-res images, following a strategy similar to Liu et al. (2024). We initialize the weights of our ViT using the SigLIP-SO400M model (Zhai et al., 2023) and continue pre-train the ViT on our multimodal data.
items.zh: 受先前工作的启发，我们的视觉编码器由一个视觉Transformer（ViT）和一个投影模块组成。ViT以图像原始宽高比接受图像作为可变长度的补丁序列，保留了图像中的固有信息结构。我们将图像大小分为三个范围：（1）中等分辨率图像，长边调整为490像素；（2）高分辨率图像，长边调整为980像素；（3）超高分辨率图像，图像动态分解为多个高分辨率图像，策略类似于Liu等人（2024）。我们使用SigLIP-SO400M模型初始化ViT的权重，并在我们的多模态数据上继续预训练ViT。

items.en: Our projection module transforms the sequence of image embeddings from the ViT into a sequence of visual tokens. It comprises a single cross-attention layer and a FFN layer. The cross-attention layer employs a set of trainable vectors as queries and the image embeddings as keys. Medium-resolution images are processed by 128 queries, whereas high-resolution images are processed by an additional 128 queries (256 queries in total). The outputs from the cross-attention layer are then fed to an FFN, which then outputs visual tokens for the MoE decoder to further process.
items.zh: 我们的投影模块将ViT的图像嵌入序列转换为视觉令牌序列。它由一个交叉注意力层和一个FFN层组成。交叉注意力层使用一组可训练向量作为查询，图像嵌入作为键。中等分辨率图像由128个查询处理，而高分辨率图像由额外的128个查询（共256个查询）处理。交叉注意力层的输出随后输入FFN，FFN输出视觉令牌供MoE解码器进一步处理。

items.en: Aria is trained on an extensively modified Megatron framework (Shoeybi et al., 2019). We eschew pipeline parallelism and instead implement a combination of expert parallelism (Lepikhin et al., 2020) and ZeRO-1 data parallelism (Rajbhandari et al., 2020) to optimize performance. Due to the carefully designed parallelism method and the small model size, Aria can be effectively trained without using tensor parallelism, which significantly reduces communication overhead and enhances training efficiency.
items.zh: Aria在广泛修改的Megatron框架上进行训练。我们避免了流水线并行，而是实现了专家并行和ZeRO-1数据并行的组合以优化性能。由于精心设计的并行方法和较小的模型规模，Aria可以在不使用张量并行的情况下有效训练，这显著减少了通信开销并提高了训练效率。

items.en: We implement a load balancing loss to prevent routing collapse and encourage balanced expert activation. We find that the expert-level load balancing loss in previous work (Fedus et al., 2022; Dai et al., 2024) is overly restrictive for our MoE due to the large number of experts. Therefore, we relax the load balancing to groups of experts, where each group contains 8 fine-grained experts. We also employ z-loss (Zoph et al., 2022) to stabilize training.
items.zh: 我们实现了负载均衡损失以防止路由崩溃并鼓励均衡的专家激活。我们发现先前工作中的专家级负载均衡损失对于我们的MoE（由于专家数量众多）过于严格。因此，我们将负载均衡放宽到专家组，每个组包含8个细粒度专家。我们还采用z-loss来稳定训练。

items.en: In this section, we delineate our 4-stage training pipeline. In each stage, the model aims to learn new capabilities while maintaining those acquired previously. We perform evaluation during each stage to ensure that such goal is achieved in a data-efficient and compute-efficient way.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了4阶段训练流程。在每个阶段，模型旨在学习新能力，同时保持先前获得的能力。我们在每个阶段进行评估，以确保以数据高效和计算高效的方式实现这一目标。

items.en: The first stage pre-trains the MoE decoder with a large amount of curated language data converted into discrete text tokens, using a next-token prediction loss, which enables the MoE to learn general knowledge about the world. The context window length is 8K tokens.
items.zh: 第一阶段使用大量精选的语言数据（转换为离散文本令牌）预训练MoE解码器，使用下一个词预测损失，使MoE学习关于世界的一般知识。上下文窗口长度为8K令牌。

items.en: Language Data. Our language pre-training data contains 6.4T tokens in total, curated from a variety of data sources containing knowledge until May 2024. We de-duplicate the data at different granularities and perform rigorous quality filtering, using a combination of rule-based approach and model-based quality classifiers. To enhance model’s in-context learning capability, we employ data clustering and pack similar data in the same sequence during training, akin to the approach in Shi et al. (2023). However, their original method is less scalable and likely to generate numerous long-tail structures when processing trillions of tokens. Instead, we utilize a minimum spanning tree algorithm for language data clustering, which resulted in a noticeable performance gain.
items.zh: 语言数据。我们的语言预训练数据总共包含6.4T令牌，来自截至2024年5月的多种数据源。我们在不同粒度上对数据进行去重，并使用基于规则的方法和基于模型的质量分类器进行严格的质量过滤。为了增强模型的上下文学习能力，我们采用数据聚类，并在训练期间将相似数据打包到同一序列中，类似于Shi等人（2023）的方法。然而，他们的原始方法可扩展性较差，在处理数万亿令牌时可能生成大量长尾结构。相反，我们使用最小生成树算法进行语言数据聚类，这带来了显著的性能提升。

items.en: The second stage pre-trains the MoE decoder and the visual encoder with a mixture of language and multimodal data, using the same next-token prediction loss. This stage aims to enable the model with broad multimodal understanding abilities, while maintaining or even improving its language understanding. To this end, the language data contains a high-quality subset of 1T tokens, covering topics including code, reasoning, and knowledge. The multimodal data contains 400B tokens from a diverse set of sources, which can be categorized into four major categories below.
items.zh: 第二阶段使用语言和多模态数据的混合预训练MoE解码器和视觉编码器，使用相同的下一个词预测损失。此阶段旨在使模型具备广泛的多模态理解能力，同时保持甚至提高其语言理解能力。为此，语言数据包含1T令牌的高质量子集，涵盖代码、推理和知识等主题。多模态数据包含来自多样化来源的400B令牌，可分为以下四大类。

items.en: Interleaved image-text web data. We extract and filter web pages from Common Crawl. The filtering process first removes web pages with low image or text quality. Then, it de-duplicate images, and removes web pages where the images and the text have low overall CLIP score (Radford et al., 2021). Additionally, we adjust the position of the images in the sequence, by moving an image to the front of a sentence if the sentence has higher CLIP score and is in front of the image. In total, we curate 190B interleaved image-text tokens.
items.zh: 交错图像-文本网页数据。我们从Common Crawl中提取并过滤网页。过滤过程首先移除图像或文本质量较低的网页。然后，对图像进行去重，并移除图像与文本整体CLIP分数较低（Radford等人，2021）的网页。此外，我们调整序列中图像的位置，如果某个句子具有更高的CLIP分数且位于图像之前，则将图像移至该句子之前。总共，我们整理了190B个交错图像-文本token。

items.en: Synthetic image captions. Alt texts directly extracted for web images are generally short, less descriptive, and noisy. It has been shown in previous work that synthetic data at scale can improve multimodal pre-training (Li et al., 2022). We thus synthesize image captions using a small model which has learned to generate longer and more descriptive image captions by re-writing the alt texts. We create synthetic captions for 300M images in the LAION-400M dataset Schuhmann et al. (2021), resulting in a total of 70B multimodal tokens.
items.zh: 合成图像标题。直接从网页图像中提取的替代文本通常较短、描述性较差且带有噪声。先前的工作表明，大规模合成数据可以改善多模态预训练（Li等人，2022）。因此，我们使用一个小模型合成图像标题，该模型通过重写替代文本学会了生成更长、更具描述性的图像标题。我们为LAION-400M数据集（Schuhmann等人，2021）中的300M张图像创建了合成标题，总共产生了70B个多模态token。

items.en: Document transcriptions and QA. To improve the model’s capability of understanding text-heavy images, we transcribe document images into texts using public OCR methods. We also render images using plain text, chart json or table/equation latex code. In order to enhance the model’s ability to not only transcribe text but also understand its meaning, we use a language model to create synthetic question-answering pairs. In total, our multimodal document data contains 102B tokens.
items.zh: 文档转录与问答。为了提高模型理解文本密集型图像的能力，我们使用公开OCR方法将文档图像转录为文本。我们还使用纯文本、图表JSON或表格/方程LaTeX代码渲染图像。为了增强模型不仅转录文本而且理解其含义的能力，我们使用语言模型创建合成问答对。总共，我们的多模态文档数据包含102B个token。

items.en: Video captions and QA. We collect 4.4M videos of varying lengths from a diverse range of sources. We train a model to generate frame-level dense descriptions for the videos. Then, we use a language model to generate question-answering pairs and video summarizations based on the dense video descriptions. In total, our video data contains 35B tokens. We select samples within 8K length for multimodal pre-training.
items.zh: 视频字幕与问答。我们从多种来源收集了440万个不同长度的视频。我们训练一个模型为视频生成帧级密集描述。然后，我们使用语言模型基于密集视频描述生成问答对和视频摘要。总共，我们的视频数据包含35B个token。我们选择长度在8K以内的样本用于多模态预训练。

full.secZh: 3.3 多模态长上下文预训练

items.en: In this stage, we pre-train on long sequences to extend the model’s context window to 64K tokens. Language long-sequence data is selected from the pre-train data source. Multimodal long-sequence data contains long videos, long documents and synthetic long sequences constructed from short multimodal data. In particular, we concatenate a sequence of independent images as input, and concatenate their image descriptions as target. This stage consumes 12B language tokens and 21B multimodal tokens, where 69% of the 33B tokens are long sequences. We increase the RoPE base frequency hyperparameter from 100K to 5M.
items.zh: 在此阶段，我们在长序列上进行预训练，以将模型的上下文窗口扩展到64K个token。语言长序列数据从预训练数据源中选择。多模态长序列数据包含长视频、长文档以及由短多模态数据构建的合成长序列。具体来说，我们将一系列独立图像拼接作为输入，并将其图像描述拼接作为目标。此阶段消耗12B个语言token和21B个多模态token，其中33B个token中的69%是长序列。我们将RoPE基频超参数从100K增加到5M。

items.en: After this stage, the model perfectly solves the needle-in-a-haystack task (Kamradt, 2023) for up to 64K context window. It also demonstrates substantial performance improvement on long video understanding and long multimodal document understanding tasks.
items.zh: 在此阶段之后，模型完美解决了长达64K上下文窗口的“大海捞针”任务（Kamradt，2023）。它在长视频理解和长多模态文档理解任务上也展示了显著的性能提升。

items.en: The final post-training stage anneals the learning rate to converge the model. The learning focuses on improving the model’s question-answering and instruction-following capabilities, using a mixture of high-quality open-source datasets and human-annotated datasets, covering domains including multimodal, code, math, and reasoning. This stage digests 20B tokens in total.
items.zh: 最终的后训练阶段通过退火学习率来收敛模型。学习重点在于提高模型的问答和指令遵循能力，使用高质量开源数据集和人工标注数据集的混合，涵盖多模态、代码、数学和推理等领域。此阶段总共消化了20B个token。

items.en: In Table 1, we compare Aria against leading open models of similar scale and proprietary models across a variety of established benchmarks. In Table 3 and Table 4, we examine the long-context multimodal understanding and instruction following capability, respectively. Based on the evaluation result, we highlight the following key observations.
items.zh: 在表1中，我们将Aria与类似规模的主流开源模型和专有模型在各种既定基准上进行了比较。在表3和表4中，我们分别考察了长上下文多模态理解和指令遵循能力。基于评估结果，我们强调以下关键观察。

items.en: Aria is the best-in-class open multimodal native model, showing clear advantages over Pixtral-12B and Llama3.2-11B across a wide range of multimodal, language, and coding tasks.
items.zh: Aria是同类最佳的开源多模态原生模型，在广泛的多模态、语言和编码任务上明显优于Pixtral-12B和Llama3.2-11B。

items.en: Aria is competitive against proprietary models on various multimodal tasks, including document understanding, chart reading, scene text recognition, and video understanding.
items.zh: Aria在各种多模态任务上与专有模型具有竞争力，包括文档理解、图表阅读、场景文本识别和视频理解。

items.en: Aria excels in long-context multimodal understanding. Real-world multimodal data is complex by nature and often involves long sequences of interleaved vision-language input, such as videos with subtitles or multi-page documents. Aria excels in understanding such data, significantly outperforming open models such as Qwen2-VL-7B (Bai et al., 2023) and LLaVA-OneVision-72B (Li et al., 2024). Compared to proprietary models, Aria outperforms GPT-4o mini in long video understanding (Wu et al., 2024), and is superior to Gemini-1.5-Flash in long document understanding, making Aria a preferable choice for processing long multimodal data in a compute-efficient and time-efficient manner.
items.zh: Aria在长上下文多模态理解方面表现出色。现实世界的多模态数据本质复杂，通常涉及长序列的交错视觉-语言输入，例如带字幕的视频或多页文档。Aria在理解此类数据方面表现出色，显著优于Qwen2-VL-7B（Bai等人，2023）和LLaVA-OneVision-72B（Li等人，2024）等开源模型。与专有模型相比，Aria在长视频理解方面优于GPT-4o mini（Wu等人，2024），在长文档理解方面优于Gemini-1.5-Flash，使得Aria成为以计算高效和时间高效方式处理长多模态数据的优选方案。

items.en: Aria has strong instruction following capabilities, outperforming other open models on both multimodal and language-only benchmarks. See Section 4.3 for qualitative examples.
items.zh: Aria具有强大的指令遵循能力，在多模态和纯语言基准测试上均优于其他开源模型。定性示例见第4.3节。

items.en: We analyze the expert activation behavior across all layers in Aria MoE after the multimodal pre-training stage. We use multimodal data from three domains for analysis: natural image, video, and PDF-format image. For each expert, we first compute its activation rate for both visual tokens and text tokens, denoted as Rvsubscript𝑅𝑣R_{v} and Rtsubscript𝑅𝑡R_{t}. Rvsubscript𝑅𝑣R_{v} refers to the number of visual tokens that activates the expert divided by the total number of visual tokens processed by all experts of that layer, and Rtsubscript𝑅𝑡R_{t} refers to the same meaning for text tokens. Then we compute the ratio Rv/Rtsubscript𝑅𝑣subscript𝑅𝑡R_{v}/R_{t}, which represents the expert’s level of visual specialization. A higher visual specialization suggests that the expert is more frequently activated by visual tokens compared to text tokens.
items.zh: 我们分析了多模态预训练阶段后Aria MoE中所有层的专家激活行为。我们使用来自三个领域的多模态数据进行分析：自然图像、视频和PDF格式图像。对于每个专家，我们首先计算其对视觉token和文本token的激活率，分别记为Rv和Rt。Rv指激活该专家的视觉token数除以该层所有专家处理的视觉token总数，Rt对文本token含义相同。然后我们计算比率Rv/Rt，表示专家的视觉专业化水平。较高的视觉专业化表明该专家相比文本token更频繁地被视觉token激活。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Visualization of expert specialization in each MoE layer.
items.capZh: 图1：每个MoE层中专家专业化的可视化。

items.en: The authors appreciate Fan Zhou, Chengen Huang, Yanpeng Li, Chongyan Zhu, Xiaoyi Ren, Peng Liu, Chao Li, Tianhang Zhu, Chenxu Lv, Xiang He, Shenzhi Wang, Chujie Zheng, Wenhao Huang, Ziyang Luo, Shiming Yang, Fengji Zhang, Yuhao Yang, Linli Yao, Xiao Li, Lihuan Zhang, Liying Li, Wen Xie, Jun Tian, Yifan Ye and Hanshu Yan for their valuable input and suggestions.
items.zh: 作者感谢范舟、陈根煌、李彦鹏、朱崇岩、任晓怡、刘鹏、李超、朱天航、吕晨旭、何翔、王慎之、郑楚杰、黄文浩、罗子扬、杨世明、张峰基、杨宇豪、姚林利、李潇、张丽欢、李丽颖、谢文、田军、叶一凡和严汉舒的宝贵意见与建议。
